title: Looks and Runs Great
description: Designed with mods for optimization and some for making it look and sound great. Just a great looking and simple Modpack. Use Distant Horizons with Shaders and have your frame rate still be playable. Enjoy!
body:
# Use Distant Horizon and Shaders Together
This mod pack includes many of the main optimization mods.

It includes shaders that work with Distant Horizons. Now you can lower your render distance for better frames per second, see further than in vanilla and it all looks beautiful because of the supported shaders!

It also includes a free cam mod and a mini map mod as well. There are other quality of life mods that just make your Minecraft experience better.

NEW!!!! The Replay Mod is now included in Version 2 and beyond.

## Included Shader Packs:

Complimentary Unbound

Photon

## Included Resource Packs:
Vocal Villagers - for a few extra sounds from the villagers

Fast Better Grass
